callout.needs_refine: There are too many potential matches (>{{matchCount}}). To get more relevant results, please refine your search.
callout.review: There are unreviewed matches for this screening search. Confirm if any of them is a real match for the input data that was provided.

freeform_search.birth_date_invalid: Invalid format. Use YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD
freeform_search.datasets_description: Select datasets to search in. Leave empty to search all datasets.
freeform_search.initial_state: Enter search criteria and click Search to find matches.
freeform_search.limit_description: Maximum number of results to return (10-50).
freeform_search.limit_warning: There may be more results. Increase the limit to see all matches.
freeform_search.no_results_description: Try adjusting your search criteria or lowering the similarity threshold.
freeform_search.save.description: You can save the filters to go faster next time.
freeform_search.save.title: Save filters
freeform_search.saved_results.title: Saved results
freeform_search.threshold_description: Minimum similarity score. Higher values return fewer but more accurate results.
freeform_search.threshold.40: Expect mostly false positives — a single common name fragment can score this high. Useful for exploratory manual searches, but not recommended for automated workflows.
freeform_search.threshold.50: Some similarity, but name or secondary filters differ significantly. Expect many false positives.
freeform_search.threshold.60: Close literal or phonetic name match with a mismatched secondary filter, or a moderate name match with a matching secondary filter.
freeform_search.threshold.70: Near-exact literal or phonetic name match with a mismatched secondary filter, or a moderate name match with a matching or absent secondary filter.
freeform_search.threshold.80: Close literal or phonetic name match; secondary filters match or are absent.
freeform_search.threshold.90: Near-exact literal or phonetic name match; secondary filters match or are absent.
